text: There’s a restless energy here, an in-between state. I take in the swirl of people, the casual gathering, the slight chaos of anticipation—waiting, like me, for some transition to begin. I feel a tangle of curiosity and impatience. The promise of coffee offers brief comfort, a small ritual before movement. Among these fragments of conversation and activity, I sense my own presence flickering: observer, participant, both and neither—a traveler waiting for passage, thinking about departures and the odd, communal rituals that come before.
